name: Mexican Mocha Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the margarine, sugar, and vanilla extract until smooth.
2. In a separate bowl, mix the flour, cocoa powder, instant coffee powder, and salt.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture, stirring until well combined.
4. Stir in the chopped walnuts and maraschino cherries.
5. Chill the dough for 1 hour.
6. Form the chilled dough into 1-inch balls and place them on an ungreased baking sheet.
7. Bake at 325°F (163°C) for 20 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack.
9. While the chocolate balls are still warm but not hot, dust with extra-fine granulated sugar.
Makes approximately 84 Mexican Mocha Balls.
